errors.supplierDataDuplicate: This supplier already has data for this culture.
errors.supplierDataMissingSupplier: Select a supplier or remove the supplier data.
errors.supplierSpecificTkgUnsupported: Supplier-specific thousand-kernel weight is no longer supported.
errors.supplierProjectMismatch: The supplier does not belong to the active project.
errors.selectedSupplierProjectMismatch: The selected seed supplier does not belong to the active project.
errors.cultureProjectMismatch: The culture does not belong to the active project.

library.importError: The public crop could not be imported.

page.title: Crop library
page.description: Browse public crops, import useful entries quickly into your project, and help improve the shared reference data step by step.
page.collaborationLoadError: Discussion and change proposals could not be loaded.

discussion.empty: No discussion for this crop yet.

proposals.intro: Public crops are not overwritten directly. Suggest changes so they can be reviewed and adopted transparently.
proposals.createError: Change proposal could not be saved.
proposals.reviewError: Change proposal could not be reviewed.

library.withdrawError: The publication could not be withdrawn.
library.removeSuccess: “{{name}}” was removed from the public crop library.
library.removeError: The culture could not be removed from the library.
library.hardDeleteError: The culture could not be permanently deleted. There are probably still references or provenance data.

withdrawDialog.title: Withdraw publication?
withdrawDialog.message: “{{name}}” disappears from the public crop library. Cultures already imported into projects remain fully intact. You can publish the culture again later.

removeDialog.title: Remove from library?
removeDialog.message: “{{name}}” is removed from the public crop library for all users. Already imported project cultures remain unchanged. Please select the moderation reason.

hardDeleteDialog.title: Permanently delete?
hardDeleteDialog.message: “{{name}}” is deleted only if no imports, provenance data, or dependencies remain. Removing from the library is intended for normal moderation cases.

emptyState.noSelectionTitle: The crop library grows with the community
emptyState.noSelectionDescription: Publish your proven cultures and share your knowledge with others. Every published culture expands the shared crop library and can be adopted by other projects.
emptyState.discoverDescription: Browse existing entries and compare varieties, suppliers, and cultivation data.
emptyState.importDescription: Import useful crops as your own project copy without changing public data.
emptyState.improveDescription: Discuss content and suggest changes so the library gets better over time.
emptyState.emptyLibraryDescription: The crop library lives from community contributions. Once suitable project cultures are published, everyone can use and improve them here.

publishConfirm.acceptLicense: I am allowed to publish this dataset and agree that it becomes a durable part of the public crop library under CC BY-SA 4.0.

publishWizard.title: Publish culture
publishWizard.intro: Choose the official crop species and confirm the original language. Everything else is checked when you publish.
publishWizard.proposalSent: The suggestion was saved and can be reviewed later.
publishWizard.translationsOptional: Missing translations can be added later.
publishWizard.requiredFieldsBlocking: Required fields are still missing before publication: {{fields}}. Please complete them in the culture details and try again.
publishWizard.duplicateBlocking: This culture appears to already exist publicly: {{duplicates}}. Please review the existing entry first.
publishWizard.licenseAlreadyAccepted: The contribution terms for the public crop library have already been accepted.
